core_instructions: Generate a wide landscape-oriented 1950s vintage newspaper. The layout must prioritize high-density text over visual elements.

visual_details.masthead: A very thin, compact header at the top with the text '半小时金融与企业监控'. Small date and issue number on the same line to save vertical space.
visual_details.layout: Dense 4-column landscape broadsheet. Each column is packed with legible, small serif body text. Tiny, postage-stamp sized monochrome illustrations only.
visual_details.style: Authentic mid-century financial journal aesthetic. Aged, slightly yellowed paper with visible grain and fiber. High-contrast black ink with subtle bleeding.
visual_details.typography: Classic newspaper serif fonts. Large bold headlines followed by multiple paragraphs of small, justified body text.
visual_details.spacing: Minimal white space. Columns are separated by thin vertical lines. High information density.
